hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); exit(1 if '.env' in d.get('file_path','') else 0)"

python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
fp = d.get('file_path', '')
if fp.endswith('.ts') and '/src/' in fp and '/client/' not in fp:
    r = subprocess.run(['npx', 'tsc', '--noEmit'], cwd='/Users/ryunko/Desktop/Projects/scraper', capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=30)
    if r.returncode != 0:
        print(r.stdout[:800])
        print(r.stderr[:800])
"
